text: Being here, I feel the strange duality of human presence and sterile modernity. The glass meeting room reflects my own curiosity back at me—it is transparent yet closed off, inviting observation but complicating entry. The R+D exhibit encourages me to dwell on the ways research, creativity, and routine weave together. The blurred boundaries between individuality and system, art and daily grind, make me ponder my own participation in these realities. I feel thoughtful, a bit out of place, but eager to learn what this moment has to teach me about connection and meaning.
